name: Scoutbee AI Supplier Discovery Platform API
what_it_does: AI-powered supplier discovery and intelligence platform with REST API — enabling procurement teams to discover new global suppliers using AI-driven search, assess supplier capabilities and risk profiles, benchmark supplier portfolios, and accelerate strategic sourcing by replacing manual supplier research with AI-curated supplier intelligence.
use_cases: Discovering qualified suppliers for specific categories via Scoutbee AI API for sourcing acceleration
Querying supplier profiles, capabilities, and risk assessments via Scoutbee API for procurement intelligence
Integrating Scoutbee supplier discovery results with P2P platforms (SAP Ariba, Coupa) via API
Benchmarking existing supplier portfolio against market alternatives via Scoutbee API
Monitoring supplier news, risk signals, and market changes via Scoutbee API for supply chain risk
not_for: Purchase order management and accounts payable (Scoutbee is supplier discovery only)
Contract management (use Icertis or Coupa Contracts for CLM)
Small business procurement (Scoutbee targets enterprise with complex supplier ecosystems)
best_when: A procurement organization needs to rapidly find qualified alternative suppliers — for supply chain diversification, sole-source risk mitigation, or new category expansion — without months of manual market research.
avoid_when: You have established supplier relationships, low supplier diversity needs, simple commodity purchasing, or need full P2P coverage rather than supplier intelligence.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for system integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with procurement intelligence access controls. No webhooks. REST API for supplier search and intelligence queries. Integration with SAP Ariba and Coupa for supplier data export. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. AI-powered supplier matching uses proprietary ML models on global supplier database.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact sales; typically based on query volume and modules
pricing.notes: German company (Würzburg). Founded 2015. Raised $60M Series B (2021). Backed by Salesforce Ventures, 83North, Lakestar. AI-first supplier discovery with global supplier database of 5M+ suppliers. Strong in automotive, manufacturing, and life sciences procurement. Used by Volkswagen Group, BASF, Henkel, Siemens. Supplier intelligence includes financial health, certifications, news monitoring. GDPR-first as German company.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for supplier search and intelligence queries. OAuth2 client credentials auth. Enterprise documentation. No webhooks — synchronous query model. Supplier search queries are AI-powered — results may vary based on query specificity. German company with GDPR-first engineering. SAP Ariba/Coupa integration for supplier data export.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Supplier queries fully idempotent — same input yields same results from supplier database. Supplier profile reads idempotent. Search results may change over time as supplier database updates.
known_agent_gotchas: AI supplier recommendations quality depends on query specificity and category clarity
Enterprise annual contract required — significant investment for supplier discovery tool
No webhooks — supplier monitoring requires polling for risk signal updates
Supplier database of 5M+ suppliers — query results require procurement expertise to evaluate
Salesforce Ventures backing — evaluate SAP Ariba/Salesforce ecosystem integration strategy

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001 compliant. EU and German data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. German company with privacy-first engineering culture. Supplier intelligence data may include commercially sensitive information — restrict access. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Competitor supplier strategies implied by search queries — protect query data.
